text.message: black do u care about 83 sheep?
I’m not doing for that spot orange
trade w black and not me makes 0 sense
what did I do to you?
i wont be keeping road, youll be fine oj
Buddy you haven’t traded with me all game
bruh u’re not trading w me all game
lol we said the same thing
don’t know what ur deal is
Do you just want me to create a brick out of thin air?
Maybe if you traded with me earlier I wouldn’t have had to port all my brixk
u’re not even explaining why ur not trading w me
If you had traded earlier, I would have brick
as long as someone takes road im fine
Since I wouldn’t have had to dump it all
No one cares what you’re fine with
This guy is all about trades when it’s his turn
But doesn’t even look at other ppl offering
